title: How fitter Duckett got back to his best | Cricket News
description: Ben Duckett has lost "five or six" kilograms since the Ashes - this is how he reaped the rewards with a century for England in the third Test against New Zealan

blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: How fitter Duckett got back to his best. Ben Duckett has lost "five or six" kilograms since the Ashes - this is how he reaped the rewards with a century for England in the third Test against New Zealand.
